description: A flanged L-bracket featuring a horizontal base plate with flange ears and a vertical wall, with mounting holes in both the base and the wall.
components: Base plate (with flange ears extending in X)
Vertical wall (aligned along the Y=0 edge of the base, centered in X)
notes: Coordinate assignments: Origin is at the center-front-bottom of the base plate's footprint if centered, but based on the prompt: Base is X from -30 to +30, Y from 0 to 40, Z from 0 to 4. Vertical wall is X from -20 to +20, Y from 0 to 4, Z from 4 to 34 (rising 30mm from the Z=4 surface). Base holes are at (X=25, Y=20) and (X=-25, Y=20) drilled through Z. Wall holes are at (X=12, Z=19) and (X=-12, Z=19) drilled through Y. Ensure the boolean subtraction for the holes is clean.
